changes: E-commerce and website builder: storefront, checkout, and related public/admin improvements.
Complete release — upload full website_module_v1.1.7.zip to the repository before clients update.
Complete release package — upload full website_module_v1.1.6.zip to the repository before clients update.
Analytics Bug fixes
Analytics migrated from JSON file storage to database-backed aggregate tables for scalability and performance.
AnalyticsManager rewritten to use DB aggregates (daily page views, hourly totals, daily country totals) while preserving geo lookup caching.
Sitemap smartening: dynamic sitemap index aggregates enabled plugins' sitemap endpoints for better crawl coverage.
Robots/sitemap alignment improvements to ensure public sections are indexable and sitemap references remain accurate.
Added/expanded LLM discovery support via /llms.txt generated from enabled plugins' declared public sections.
Bug fixes
Major SEO overhaul: robust meta/OG/social tags, canonical, JSON-LD, favicon/OG image logic.
Modern always-on cookie bar with customizable color, Accept/Decline, and consent enforcement.
No analytics/tracking scripts load before consent.
Admin UI: all cookie bar/policy/SEO/social settings editable.
Cookie bar live preview in admin settings.
Policy generator and markdown-to-HTML display improvements.
All template logic robust to missing meta/OG/page data.
Accessibility and responsive layout improvements.
Added website builder demonstrator.
Initial release.
